fields.scope_note: WA (SWIS) and NT (DKIS) are not in the NEM. For whole-of-Australia state generation totals include AEMO WEM data (WA) and DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics (NT and totals).
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO Data Dashboard NEM and WEM; OpenNEM Annual reports per region.
fields.keying_plan: Key annual TWh per region from AEMO QED full-year edition. WA SWIS values from AEMO WEM dashboard. NT from DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics Table O.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual generation TWh per NEM region plus SWIS and DKIS. The NEM has five regions (NSW+ACT, VIC, QLD, SA, TAS); WA and NT are separate.
citation: AEMO Quarterly Energy Dynamics; AEMO WEM Data Dashboard; DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics.
